invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.096（新止损位）或融资费率超过0.03%（轧多风险进一步加剧），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.096 (new stop-loss) or funding rate exceeds 0.03% (long squeeze risk intensifies further).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破68000（基于ATR 641.76和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 68000 (based on ATR 641.76 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).
